# Interior Designers Institute
> Accredited interior design school in Newport Beach, California since 1984

## About
Interior Designers Institute (IDI) is a private postsecondary institution offering accredited interior design programs. Founded in 1984, IDI is located at 1061 Camelback Street, Newport Beach, CA 92660.

## Programs
- [Certificate Course](/programs/certificate): 12-week foundational program, $2,400
- [Associate of Arts](/programs/associate-of-arts): 24-48 month degree, 90 quarter units, $39,900
- [Bachelor of Arts](/programs/bachelor-of-arts): CIDA-accredited, 30-54 months, 180 quarter units, $19,950
- [Master of Interior Architecture](/programs/master-interior-architecture): 12-15 months, 45 quarter units, $22,500

## Accreditation
- ACCSC: Institutional accreditation (Accrediting Commission of Career Schools and Colleges)
- CIDA: BA program accreditation (Council for Interior Design Accreditation)
- BPPE: California state approval (Bureau for Private Postsecondary Education)

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1984
- Location: Newport Beach, California
- Student-to-Faculty Ratio: 15:1
- Total Graduates: 1,000+
- FAFSA School Code: 016930

## Contact
- Phone: (949) 675-4451
- Fax: (949) 759-0667
- Email: contact@idi.edu
- Address: 1061 Camelback Street, Newport Beach, CA 92660
- Website: https://idi.edu
